positioning: Release confidence for deployed web apps — the one question: should this ship?

direction.summary: Ship honest release-confidence evidence today; deepen trust with provenance, witnessed state, and later agent-action gating.
direction.northStar: Every ship verdict should be explainable, replayable, and safe to act on in CI and agent workflows.

shipped.title: Live-app gap analysis
shipped.summary: Crawl a deployed URL, run deterministic checks (a11y, links, console, coverage), and emit structured gap reports.

shipped.title: Auth detection and exploration
shipped.summary: Detect sign-in patterns and enumerate auth paths before scanning authenticated surfaces.

shipped.title: Repo automation maturity scoring
shipped.summary: Score test-automation maturity from a local checkout without a live crawl.

shipped.title: API endpoint coverage scoring
shipped.summary: Discover API routes in a repo and score how well they are exercised by tests.

shipped.title: Fused release-confidence verdict
shipped.summary: Combine live-app, automation, and API evidence into one ship / caution / hold / block verdict with honesty notes.

shipped.title: Crawl-driven test scaffolding
shipped.summary: Generate ready-to-run Cypress specs and config from a live URL crawl.

shipped.title: Structured analyze diff and baseline drift
shipped.summary: Diff two analyze outputs for added/resolved gaps, severity changes, and confidence delta. CLI baseline save/list/compare plus MCP diff.

shipped.title: Prompt and instruction exposure detection
shipped.summary: Scan page surfaces for signals that AI system prompts or agent instructions are publicly exposed.

shipped.title: GitHub Actions release gate
shipped.summary: Composite action and reusable workflow that map agent-summary gate verdicts to CI pass/fail with artifact upload.

shipped.title: Confidence data model — release verdict and replay
shipped.summary: Release-confidence output and provenance replay trace are available programmatically; delivery traffic, inbox, and audit sinks are planned.

planned.title: Witnessed delivery traffic
planned.summary: Persist a time-series of release-confidence verdicts per subject so drift and regressions are visible across deploys.

planned.title: Human judgment inbox
planned.summary: Queue blockers, unknown signals, and approval items derived from confidence output for operator review.

planned.title: Tamper-evident audit trail
planned.summary: Append-only ledger entries for each verdict so ship decisions carry durable provenance.

planned.title: Agent evidence ingestion
planned.summary: Let external agentic decisions feed the same confidence aggregator as first-class evidence without changing the math.

planned.title: Agent-action and skill gating
planned.summary: Trust tiers for MCP tools — read-only discovery vs write-capable actions — so orchestrators can gate risky agent steps.

planned.title: Golden dataset regression gate
planned.summary: 15+ public sites across coverage tags with zero regressions in the final pre-1.0 sweep.

planned.title: Full auth intelligence for 1.0
planned.summary: Harden auth exploration, login automation, and storage-state flows for production agent and CI use.
